title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
resolution_summary: Added validation in RenderPluginConfig to reject plugins with an empty Name field, returning an error that includes the plugin's index for debuggability. Also clarified the AppName field's doc comment in PipelineSpec to document the behavior when it is empty. A corresponding unit test (TestRenderPluginConfig_emptyNameReturnsError) was added to verify the new validation.
